data.author: amiller27
data.message:
Fix logging finalization as a subproject (#590)

* Fix logging finalization as a subproject

Previously, including e.g. ProxSuite as a subproject of a CMake project
caused the call to logging_finalize to have an empty
JRL_CMAKEMODULE_LOGGING_FILENAME, which caused files named `##
------------ ##\n` to be created in the project source directory with
contents "the rest of the stuff supposed to be written to
JRL_CMAKEMODULE_LOGGING_FILENAME".  This seems to fix that for my use
case, but I'm not sure if it's generally correct.

Topic: logging-finalize-filename

* [pre-commit.ci] auto fixes from pre-commit.com hooks

for more information, see https://pre-commit.ci

---------

Co-authored-by: pre-commit-ci[bot] <66853113+pre-commit-ci[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

Get more informations with the macro FindPython

every package, so it's just to simplify the cmake code

data.author: ahundt
data.message:
Can now generate standard CMake *Config.cmake and *Version.cmake files. (#103)

* Can now generate standard CMake *Config.cmake and *Version.cmake files.
based on: https://github.com/forexample/package-example

* added missing Config.cmake.in

* base.cmake caps fixed, removed extra comments

* Config.cmake.in capitalization fix

* SETUP_PROJECT_PACKAGE_FINALIZE is now public
as discussed, this is option 1 in the following comment:
https://github.com/jrl-umi3218/jrl-cmakemodules/pull/103#issuecomment-257168184

* package.cmake added, moved SETUP_PROJECT_PACKAGE_FINALIZE

* rename package.cmake to package-config.cmake and move setup init
as per pull request comments linked here:
https://github.com/jrl-umi3218/jrl-cmakemodules/pull/103#issuecomment-264356921
